communication.feature_described: Bioluminescent patterns along ridge used for communication
communication.reasoning: Bioluminescent visual signalling is a form of visual communication, which falls within the Earth-typical category of visual signals.

habitat.feature_described: Liquid ammonia ocean on a cryogenic world
habitat.reasoning: Per the boundary rule, underwater environments with exotic chemistry like ammonia still count as water-like aquatic habitats and score 0.

cognition.feature_described: Decentralized distributed net of ganglia with no central brain
cognition.reasoning: The nervous system is explicitly described as decentralized with distributed ganglia rather than a central brain.

symmetry.feature_described: Tri-radial symmetry with three primary arms and three sensory arms
symmetry.reasoning: Tri-radial symmetry is a fundamentally different symmetry type from the Earth-default bilateral symmetry.

sensory_organs.feature_described: Solvodynamic sensing, electrosensory pits, and infrared receptors distributed across body
sensory_organs.reasoning: Primary senses are pressure/chemical gradient detection and electroreception with no distinct head, departing fundamentally from head-based eyes/ears/nose.

locomotion.feature_described: Three primary arms undulate for propulsion through liquid ammonia
locomotion.reasoning: Undulating arm-based swimming propulsion is fundamentally different from leg-based locomotion.

body_plan.feature_described: Flattened starfish/manta ray form with no distinct head or torso
body_plan.reasoning: A tri-radial flattened form without a distinct head-torso-limb arrangement departs from the standard Earth body plan.

skin_covering.feature_described: Thick leathery hide of polymerized hydrocarbons with iridescent patterning
skin_covering.reasoning: Though composed of polymerized hydrocarbons, it is described as leathery hide, which is functionally analogous to Earth-typical skin/leather coverings.

reproduction.feature_described: Sequential hermaphrodites releasing crystalline spore-sacs at thermal vents
reproduction.reasoning: Sequential hermaphroditism combined with spore-sac release and years-long environmental gestation departs from standard binary-sex sexual reproduction.

metabolism.feature_described: Chemotrophic, catalyzing redox reactions between seabed minerals and dissolved gases
metabolism.reasoning: Chemosynthesis via a specialized Reactor Gland processing minerals and gases is fundamentally non-organic-matter-based energy sourcing.

communication.feature_described: Low-frequency pressure pulses through ammonia and iridescent skin color changes
communication.reasoning: Low-frequency pulses are acoustic-like and color changes are visual signals, both falling within Earth-default sound-based and visual communication.

habitat.feature_described: Liquid ammonia oceans on a cryogenic planet at -70°C
habitat.reasoning: Per the boundary rule, underwater environments with exotic chemistry like ammonia still count as water-like aquatic habitats and score 0.

cognition.reasoning: No cognitive architecture is explicitly described, so the Earth default of a centralised nervous system is assumed.
